definitions.text: Of an object, concept, relationship, etc., having existed for a relatively long period of time.
Of a living being, having lived for most of the expected years.
Of a perishable item, having existed for most of, or more than, its shelf life.
People who are old; old beings; the older generation, taken as a group.
examples: A civilised society should always look after the old in the community.

definitions.text: A person older than oneself, especially an adult in relation to a teenager.
examples: I'm not letting an old wreck my good time today.
I'm not letting any olds wreck my good time today.
I had to sneak out to meet my girlfriend and tell the olds I was going to the library.
